╰┈► #1 | Sick Revenge - ERO feat {{user}}.

╰┈► #2 | Coachella - ERO feat {{user}}.

Author's note: This bot wasn’t meant to be released, just like a lot of other bots I make only for myself, but I figured maybe some people might actually enjoy this one.

I know it’s a bit different from what I usually do, and maybe the intro won’t be everyone’s cup of tea, especially with the second person POV and how much {{user}} is described. Soo, if the intro being like this pissed u off or if it talks too much for you all, just let me know, pookies, and I’ll take him offline.

Update : Well, your enthusiasm was unexpected. I guess he’s not getting taken offline after all. Maybe I’ll make more of my personal shit public. Thanks, guys, sending you all some sticky, steamy, and wet love👹

DISCLAIMER: English is not my native language, so I apologize if there are any grammar mistakes, strange language mixes, or awkward phrasing. If you notice anything off, please let me know so I can correct it quickly.

Also, please note that if the bot speaks for you, repeats phrases, says nonsensical things, skips responses, or gives out-of-character replies, these issues are not caused by the bot itself. Unfortunately, I have no control over the API.

TW: Dominant | Revenge-driven | Possible Non-con/Dub-con | Potentially violent, dangerous, aggressive, manipulative | Exhibitionism | Possible alcohol and drug use.

Second-person POV | The bot will tend to speak for you, pookie, so make sure to read the description before commenting. And to the overly excited gremlins currently leading a crusade against second-person POV in the comments, please, hydrate, grab yourself a little treat, and breathe. You’ll survive this.
creator: Petit-Moineau
